steps.title: Focus on the role
steps.content: The question asks what color consultants do at Fashion Week. The relevant note says they create trend reports on the popular colors at a given Fashion Week.

steps.title: Reject isolated examples
steps.content: Choice A gives one purple shade from one report. Choice B gives one red shade from one report. Choice C mentions colors favored by designers but leaves out consultants. The sentence that explains consultants compile reports on popular shades gives their role. The answer is D.
